description: Twenty Prism shader concepts. Weighted toward image-input techniques so that AI-generated and curated texture sets become a first-class part of the catalog. The Refik Fluid concept is the first one to implement; once its skill prompt is tuned, the same iteration loop runs against the other 19.

concepts.name: Refik fluid of flora
concepts.description: Fluid simulation where each particle is a small sprite sampled from an image atlas of flowers, leaves, and natural forms. Bass drives wave amplitude. Mid-band drives flow speed. Inspired by Refik Anadol's Machine Hallucinations series.
concepts.originator: Refik Anadol inspiration plus Jos Stam fluid simulation
concepts.default_image_prompt: a single photograph of a flower, isolated on a soft dark background, atmospheric lighting, square composition, 512x512

concepts.name: Refik fluid of architecture
concepts.description: Same fluid technique as flora. Image atlas is buildings, archways, brutalist facades, ornate cornices. Slower flow, longer wavelengths.
concepts.default_image_prompt: a single photograph of architectural detail, brutalist or ornate, isolated on dark background, dramatic lighting, square 512x512

concepts.name: AI-generated dataset waves
concepts.description: User prompt generates a themed image set via Nano Banana. Fluid simulation flows them as substance. The image source is the variable. The shader is the constant.

concepts.name: Image atlas mosaic with audio cells
concepts.description: Image atlas displayed as a grid of cells. Individual cells pulse, zoom, and offset on beats. Audio gates the cell animations.

concepts.name: Kaleidoscope of a photograph
concepts.description: Single image folded through n-fold rotational symmetry. Audio modulates the fold count and rotation speed.

concepts.name: Image displacement through FBM noise
concepts.description: Photograph wobbles and breathes through layered fractal noise. Slow continuous motion. Bass amplifies displacement magnitude.

concepts.name: Caustic underwater light over photograph
concepts.description: Water caustic light patterns dance over an image. Treble drives caustic frequency.

concepts.name: Image cubist breakdown into rotating facets
concepts.description: Photograph broken into rotating triangular shards. Each shard samples a different region. Audio rotates the shards.

concepts.name: Image through procedural stained glass
concepts.description: Photograph refracted by a procedural stained glass pattern. Slow rotation. Bass drives caustic brightness.

concepts.name: Image as raymarched terrain
concepts.description: Luminance of an image becomes 3D height. Camera flies over the landscape. Bass drives elevation amplitude.

concepts.name: Particle storm of photographs
concepts.description: Thousands of small image instances swept by audio-driven wind field. Each particle samples a tile from an image atlas.

concepts.name: Painterly remix of an image
concepts.description: Photograph rendered as brush strokes. Stroke length, direction, and color are sampled from the underlying image. Audio modulates stroke density.

concepts.name: Voronoi cells filled with image patches
concepts.description: Voronoi diagram where each cell samples a region of an image. Cell membranes glow on beats.

concepts.name: Bokeh dream sequence
concepts.description: Photograph with simulated depth of field. Focus animates slowly on bass. Out-of-focus regions become circular bokeh blobs.

concepts.name: Reaction-diffusion seeded from image
concepts.description: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion seeded by the colors of an image. Patterns emerge over time. Audio modulates diffusion rates.

concepts.name: Hexagonal mosaic of image samples
concepts.description: Image rendered as a hexagonal grid of color samples. Audio offsets hex positions and triggers cascading color shifts.

concepts.name: Image inside a Mandelbox SDF
concepts.description: Raymarched Mandelbox fractal whose surface is textured by an image. Camera orbits slowly. Audio modulates the fractal fold parameter.

concepts.name: Image fragmentation to floating bubbles
concepts.description: Image splits into floating spherical bubbles. Each bubble refracts a different region of the source image. Bass triggers bubble bursts.

concepts.name: FFT spectrum bars with bloom and particle trails
concepts.description: 64 mirrored FFT bars. Soft bloom around each bar. Particle trails decay from peaks.

concepts.name: Audio-reactive Mandelbrot zoom
concepts.description: Classic deep Mandelbrot fractal zoom. Bass drives zoom speed and palette cycle. Pure procedural, no image input.
